headline: Two services. One practitioner who knows your name.

items.name: Colon Hydrotherapy
items.description: A gentle, thorough cleanse of the large intestine. Many clients describe leaving a session feeling noticeably lighter, more comfortable, and more at ease in their body. Sessions take place in a fully private room with professional equipment.

items.name: Lymphatic Drainage
items.description: A gentle manual technique focused on supporting the body's natural lymphatic flow. Clients often describe a sense of ease and reduced heaviness after a session. A quiet, restful experience that many find deeply relaxing.
